mapper.select: SELECT * FROM VX_CorpTag WHERE deleted = 0 ORDER BY sortOrder
mapper.insert:
INSERT INTO VX_CorpTag (id, tagId, tagName, groupId, groupName, sortOrder, deleted, createTime, updateTime) VALUES
(#{item.id}, #{item.tagId}, #{item.tagName}, #{item.groupId}, #{item.groupName}, #{item.sortOrder}, 0, GETDATE(), GETDATE())
mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM VX_CorpTag WHERE deleted = 0 AND groupId IS NULL
AND ( tagName LIKE '%' + #{tagName} + '%' OR tagId IN ( SELECT groupId FROM VX_CorpTag WHERE deleted = 0 AND groupId IS NOT NULL AND tagName LIKE '%' + #{tagName} + '%' ) )
ORDER BY sortOrder, id OFFSET #{offset} ROWS FETCH NEXT #{size} ROWS ONLY

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM VX_CorpTag WHERE deleted = 0 AND groupId IS NULL
AND ( tagName LIKE '%' + #{tagName} + '%' OR tagId IN ( SELECT groupId FROM VX_CorpTag WHERE deleted = 0 AND groupId IS NOT NULL AND tagName LIKE '%' + #{tagName} + '%' ) )
